description_long: This trash bin features a tall, rectangular form with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in a matte dark gray color. The front face is distinguished by a vertical, yellow-green translucent or reflective panel, possibly for visibility or decorative purposes. One side displays a large, black rectangular panel, which may serve as a door or access hatch for emptying the bin. The top surface is flat and includes a small, green keypad or control panel, suggesting a secure or automated opening mechanism. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from metal or high-strength plastic, suitable for urban environments. There is minimal visible signage, with only a small 'R' marking on the lower front corner.
description: A tall, rectangular, matte dark gray trash bin with a vertical yellow-green panel on the front and a small green keypad on top. It has a modern, robust design with minimal signage and a possible access hatch on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical yellow-green panel and a small 'R' marking at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view with a large black rectangular panel, likely an access door, and no visible yellow-green panel.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain dark gray surface and the green keypad visible on the top left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain dark gray with the green keypad on the top right, no panels or markings.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Small 'R' marking on the lower front; otherwise unmarked
